subject: langchain-openai
truth: Stop relying on raw v1 streamed tool call chunk format; tool call chunks are now normalized.
quote: fix(core,openai): normalize v1 streamed tool calls (#35983)

subject: langchain
truth: Structured output model fallbacks are now tighter; previously working fallback chains may fail or behave differently.
quote: fix(langchain): tighten structured output model fallbacks (#38042)

subject: langchain-anthropic
truth: Anthropic's allowed_prefixes are now more restrictive; previously allowed prefixes may now be rejected.
quote: fix(langchain,anthropic): confine file-search results and tighten anthropic `allowed_prefixes` (#38106)

subject: create_react_agent import
truth: Stop importing create_react_agent from langgraph.prebuilt; import create_agent from langchain.agents instead.
quote: `from langgraph.prebuilt import create_react_agent` is replaced by `from langchain.agents import create_agent`.

subject: LLMChain
truth: Stop using LLMChain; it has been moved to the langchain-classic package.
quote: Legacy chains `LLMChain` and `ConversationChain` are moved to `langchain-classic`.

subject: ConversationChain
truth: Stop using ConversationChain; it has been moved to the langchain-classic package.
quote: Legacy chains `LLMChain` and `ConversationChain` are moved to `langchain-classic`.

subject: MultiQueryRetriever
truth: Stop using MultiQueryRetriever from the main langchain package; it has been moved to langchain-classic.
quote: The retrievers module (e.g. `MultiQueryRetriever`) is moved to `langchain-classic`.

subject: indexing API
truth: Stop using the indexing API from the main langchain package; it has been moved to langchain-classic.
quote: The indexing API is moved to `langchain-classic`.

subject: hub module
truth: Stop using the hub module from the main langchain package; it has been moved to langchain-classic.
quote: The hub module is moved to `langchain-classic`.

subject: CacheBackedEmbeddings
truth: Stop using CacheBackedEmbeddings from the main langchain package; it has been moved to langchain-classic.
quote: Embeddings modules (`CacheBackedEmbeddings`, community embeddings) are moved to `langchain-classic`.

subject: community embeddings
truth: Stop using community embeddings from the main langchain package; they have been moved to langchain-classic.
quote: Embeddings modules (`CacheBackedEmbeddings`, community embeddings) are moved to `langchain-classic`.

subject: langchain-community re-exports
truth: Stop using langchain-community re-exports from the main langchain package; they have been moved to langchain-classic.
quote: `langchain-community` re-exports are moved to `langchain-classic`.

subject: prompt parameter in agent creation
truth: Stop using the `prompt` parameter when creating agents; use `system_prompt` instead.
quote: The `prompt` parameter is renamed to `system_prompt` in agent creation.

subject: .bind_tools() with agents
truth: Stop passing pre-bound models with tools via .bind_tools() when creating agents; it is no longer supported.
quote: Pre-bound models with tools via `.bind_tools()` are no longer supported when creating agents.

subject: Pydantic models and dataclasses for state schemas
old: Pydantic models and dataclasses for state schemas
truth: Stop using Pydantic models or dataclasses for state schemas; use TypedDict only.
quote: Pydantic models and dataclasses for state schemas are removed; use `TypedDict` only.

from_fact: pydantic models and dataclasses for state schemas

subject: example parameter from AIMessage
truth: Stop passing the `example` parameter to AIMessage; it has been removed.
quote: The `example` parameter is removed from `AIMessage`.

subject: response_format for prompted output
truth: Stop using `response_format` for prompted output; it has been removed.
quote: Prompted output via `response_format` is removed.

subject: ToolNode instances in tools argument
old: passing ToolNode instances in the tools argument
truth: Stop passing ToolNode instances in the tools argument; it has been removed.
quote: Passing `ToolNode` instances in the tools argument is removed.

from_fact: passing toolnode instances in the tools argument

subject: pre-model and post-model hook functions
truth: Stop using pre-model and post-model hook functions; they have been removed.
quote: Pre-model and post-model hook functions are removed.

subject: hook functions
truth: Stop using hook functions; use middleware with `before_model` / `after_model` methods instead.
quote: Hook functions are replaced by middleware with `before_model` / `after_model` methods.

subject: tool error handling
truth: Stop using old tool error handling; use middleware with a `wrap_tool_call` method instead.
quote: Tool error handling is replaced by middleware with a `wrap_tool_call` method.

subject: dynamic prompts
truth: Stop using the old dynamic prompt approach; use the `@dynamic_prompt` decorator instead.
quote: Dynamic prompts are replaced by the `@dynamic_prompt` decorator.

subject: dynamic models
truth: Stop using the old dynamic model approach; use `DynamicModelMiddleware` instead.
quote: Dynamic models are replaced by `DynamicModelMiddleware`.

subject: runtime context location
truth: Stop passing runtime context via config["configurable"]; use the `context` parameter instead.
quote: Runtime context moved from `config["configurable"]` to the `context` parameter.

subject: message .text() method
truth: Stop calling .text() as a method on messages; use the `.text` property instead.
quote: The message `.text()` method is replaced by the `.text` property.
